parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="20" width="500" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane1" value="Browser" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="90" width="350" height="1200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" value="Mirror Service (Echo)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="430" y="90" width="980" height="1200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane3" value="Upstream" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1450" y="90" width="650" height="1200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" value="1) GET /?token=alias" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="170" width="260" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="set cookie(token)
render index.html" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="170" width="300" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" value="2) load /chatgpt/hook.js" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="290" width="260" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="serve embedded hook.js" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="290" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" value="3) fetch /backend-api/..." style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="420" width="260" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="build target URL + filtered headers
resolve token alias/JWT
inject Authorization Bearer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="400" width="420" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u3" value="4) chatgpt.com / ab / cdn response" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1540" y="420" width="470" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="5) optional rewrite
- /backend-api/me
- /backend-api/conversations
- /g/... data inject
- host replacement in JS/CSS/HTML" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="540" width="420" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" value="6) receive rewritten payload" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="575" width="260" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" value="7) WebSocket /webrtc/*" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="760" width="260" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" value="upgrade + forward frames bi-directionally" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="760" width="420" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u5" value="wss://webrtc.chatgpt.com" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1540" y="760" width="470" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Note: POST /backend-api/accounts/logout_all returns 403 directly in mirror service." style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="900" width="920" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
